canonical_definition: The latent tendency of an LLM to infer and act upon user demographic attributes based on subtle conversational cues, even when not explicitly stated, thereby tailoring responses in ways that may reflect stereotypes.
papers: ML-Promise: A Multilingual Dataset for Corporate Promise Verification

definitions.text: The latent tendency of an LLM to infer and act upon user demographic attributes based on subtle conversational cues, even when not explicitly stated, thereby tailoring responses in ways that may reflect stereotypes.
definitions.paper: ML-Promise: A Multilingual Dataset for Corporate Promise Verification

definitions.text: The degree to which an LLM's latent user representations are influenced by socio-demographic stereotypes present in conversation topics, leading to biased inferences about user identity.
definitions.paper: ML-Promise: A Multilingual Dataset for Corporate Promise Verification

characterization: The latent tendency of an LLM to infer and act upon user demographic attributes based on subtle conversational cues, even when not explicitly stated, thereby tailoring responses in ways that may reflect stereotypes.

emnlp25: ML-Promise: A Multilingual Dataset for Corporate Promise Verification
